description: Infernal tinkerer who combines necromantic relics with precise constructed weapons.

presentation.headline: Relic mechanic who assembles precision pressure from bone and infernal iron.
presentation.fantasy_hook: Cracked goggles, a bone-machine backpack, and a clamped eye scepter make the artificer a readable infernal inventor.
presentation.identity_summary: The Bone Artificer mixes necromantic tools with guns, artifacts, and deployable magic. Each takedown feeds a short salvage calculation that improves range and damage.
presentation.passive_summary: Enemy kills briefly grant attack range and damage, stacking up to three times as useful parts accumulate.
tradeoffs: Mixed arsenal lacks one pure cadence
Needs takedowns to finish the salvage cycle
